title: OcrLine
description: One recognized text line plus its normalized bounding box. The parser's input is an ordered list of these (reading order: top-to-bottom, then left-to-right). Origin is TOP-LEFT; all box values are normalized to 0..1.

yTop.description: Top edge of the box (normalized; 0 = top of image).

h.description: Box height (normalized) — used as glyph-height proxy to find the largest (final) price.

conf.description: OCR confidence 0..1 (not used by the parser; carried through for callers).
